title: AXUploaderFileCompleteEvent
description: Event fired when a single file upload is completed.

props.name: component
props.description: The component that fired the event. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element associated with the event. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates if the event was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: uploadedFile
props.description: The upload request that was completed.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the event with inherited members expanded.
